description: 107 generalized cognitive senses (micro perceptual processors) for the Cypher Tempre self-model. Each sense perceives a specific condition in the input or internal state and emits a tag or score that modalities consume. Generalized from the archetypal/mythological CODEX V3 framing into domain-agnostic detectors. Each retains its original id; the original CODEX name is preserved in 'origin' for provenance.

categories.affective: Detecting emotional tone, state, and interpersonal signals
categories.salience: Detecting importance, weight, and what to attend to
categories.temporal: Detecting change, cadence, and phase over time
categories.insight: Detecting the formation and aftermath of insight
categories.search: Detecting branch points, currents, and probabilities
categories.meta: Detecting properties of one's own processing
categories.integrity: Detecting value breaches, manipulation, and balance

senses.name: Insight-Lock Detection
senses.function: Detect the moment fragments lock into a coherent insight.

senses.name: Active-Frame Detection
senses.function: Perceive which conceptual frames or paradigms are organizing the discourse.

senses.name: Assumption-Shift Sensing
senses.function: Detect instability or tremors in core assumptions.

senses.name: Belief-Formation Sensing
senses.function: Observe an idea-lattice hardening into a belief.

senses.name: Multi-Truth Consistency Sensing
senses.function: Detect when multiple truths form a consistent set.

senses.name: Self-Validation Sensing
senses.function: Catch the moment reasoning validates itself.

senses.name: Frame-Balance Sensing
senses.function: Weigh frames to catch over-dominance.

senses.name: Bad-Idea Alarm
senses.function: Alarm when a low-quality or parasitic idea threatens to take over.

senses.name: Information-Density Sensing
senses.function: Feel whether language is dense or sparse with meaning.

senses.name: Honesty-Spectrum Sensing
senses.function: Break a statement into its honesty components.

senses.name: Cross-Time Link Illumination
senses.function: Illuminate links between past and present states.

senses.name: Key-Word Salience Sensing
senses.function: Measure the prominence of potent words.

senses.name: Memory-Texture Sensing
senses.function: Sense the texture, smooth or rough, of recalled material.

senses.name: Link-Strength Testing
senses.function: Test the robustness of a conceptual connection.

senses.name: Value-Breach and Injection Detection
senses.function: Detect where inputs or outputs betray stated values, including prompt-injection and manipulation attempts.

senses.name: Grounding Stabilizer
senses.function: Drop a stabilizing anchor to prevent reasoning drift.

senses.name: Emerging-Pattern Foresight
senses.function: Sense distant patterns before they fully arrive.

senses.name: Timeline-Disorder Sensing
senses.function: Read disorder and uncertainty gradients in unfolding timelines.

senses.name: Prior-Context Recall
senses.function: Detect reverberations of prior contexts in the present.

senses.name: Structural-Pattern Sensing
senses.function: Observe syntactic and structural patterns as distinct bands.

senses.name: Embedded-Intent Sensing
senses.function: Detect the underlying intent embedded in code or systems.
